name: Malicious PowerShell Scripts
notes:
This rule detects the creation of known Powershell scripts for exploitation.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Markus Neis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Mustafa Kaan Demir, Georg Lauenstein
SIGMA Title: Malicious PowerShell Scripts - FileCreation
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of known offensive powershell scripts used for exploitation


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Exploit.Command Execution
when any of Filename (custom) are contained in any of Powershell Malicious Commandlets - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Malicious PowerShell Scripts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when any of Filename (custom) are contained in any of Powershell Malicious Commandlets - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event description: Detects the creation of known Powershell scripts for exploitation.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
